queue_item.action: Materialize queue state from the canonical snapshot plus an explicit event-ordered additive update set without claiming completeness by default.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed against byte-equivalent committed source.
progress.authority_boundary: Output remains authoritative=false unless complete repository enumeration is explicitly attested; that attestation is not independently verified.
progress.privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and operational claim states only.

queue_item.handoff: Add an explicit manifest of every queue-update path and SHA, bind that manifest cryptographically, and verify it against an independently enumerated repository tree before permitting authoritative=true.
